tasks.title: **Fixed (CCP-466)**
tasks.notes: DB name corrected, attempts now written

tasks.title: Audit SF18 WASM UCI options for strength limiting; read Lichess rateBot.ts
Trace engine lifecycle in ctrl.ts, identify safe mode-switch injection points
Persist last-used strength level in localStorage (`patzer.playStrengthLevel`)
Design bestmove routing for play mode — callback slot in ctrl.ts vs dedicated listener
Implement `requestPlayMove()` and `cancelPlayMove()` with one-shot bestmove callback routing
Add `playMoveWithDelay()` — variable delay scaled by strength level + random jitter
Build + typecheck + console integration test (call from devtools, verify move returned)
Add `strengthLevel` to PracticeSession type; accept in `startPractice()`
Wire `requestPlayMove` into `schedulePracticeOpponentResponse` at the `'request-engine'` branch (view.ts:2320); call `exitPlayMode()` on practice stop
Update practice banner to show strength level label when source is 'engine'
End-to-end validation: practice until repertoire exhausts, verify engine plays at reduced strength, verify analysis resumes after stop
Audit Lichess AI level selector UI pattern — see [`docs/reference/LICHESS_AI_LEVEL_SELECTOR_AUDIT.md`](../reference/LICHESS_AI_LEVEL_SELECTOR_AUDIT.md)
Embed selector in practice setup panel (view.ts `renderPracticeSetupPanel`)
**Done**
